summary: Patched the marketing loop so an empty execution board now forces a fresh primary-repo-flat contact discovery refresh after repeated prepared-only packet churn, instead of waiting only on artifact age.

findings: marketing_execution_board_latest.md still says there is no truthful do-now packet in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.md chose distribution_architecture_repair for the same empty-board state
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json marks primary-repo-flat packet refresh churn as repetitive and low-signal
adoption_metrics_latest.json still shows Codeberg stars/watchers/forks flat across the active window

behavior: Added repeat-churn detection for prepared-only primary-repo-flat packet logs over a 48-hour window
Forced discovery refresh when the execution board is empty and that churn threshold is hit, even if the artifact is otherwise fresh
Extended the refresh log payload so forced churn-driven refreshes are distinguishable from plain staleness refreshes

expected_outcome: The next truthful post-hold run gets a fresh publisher-target search when the old packet keeps cycling without live delivery, increasing the odds of a genuinely new Codeberg-first outreach lane.
